title: FLORA GUARD Bulb Planter Tool Long Handle, Serrated Base Gardening Bulb Transplanter with Soft Grip, Carbon Steel Seed Planting Tools for Digging Holes to Plant Tulips, Iris, Daffodils
features: 【Widely Used】: This bulb planter tool long handle will be the best assistant for your planting career. It digs perfect holes for tulips, daffodil, crocus, dahlias, gladiolus, lilies, or any other flower bulbs and most bedding plants. Dig Holes: 8.9cm dia, Max 11.4cm depth.

【Easy to Operate】: Get this garden bulb planter, planting job will be a piece of cake. The gardening bulb transplanter is easy to install within minutes, and then step, twist, pull and you are ready to plant. Dig 11.4cm diameter planting holes quickly, one after another, from a comfortable standing position.

【Stand-up Planting】: With its long handle, bulb planter allows you to stand upright while working, avoiding excessive bending of the back and improving efficiency. The sawtooth-shaped base makes it easier to digging holes into the soil and lawn, while the treadle design maximizes the use of your body weight and downward force to effortlessly release soil cores.

【High Quality Materials】: This bulb planter tool is made of high quality carbon steel, which is durable, strong, wear-resistant and not easy to break, and can provide long-term service. The powder coating of the surface prevents rust and protects the bulb pots from the elements.

【Perfect After-Sales Service】FLORA GUARD guarantees that our goal is to contribute to the greenery of the garden. If you have any problems with our garden weeders, please feel free to contact us. Our professional service team will support you until the problem is resolved.
